repo.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability
repo.name: neovim

body:
## Problem


When ASAN detects an error in a child process, the process may be killed
by test teardown before ASAN finishes writing its log file. This results
in truncated logs with no stack trace:

```
==30487==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: stack-buffer-overflow on address ...
= READ of size 8 at 0x7bb83bc8c760 thread T0
```

Also, the sanitizer log content was only written to stdout (which the
test runner may not display) and not included in the test_assert error
message.

## Solution
- Poll (up to 2s) for the ASAN "SUMMARY" line before reading, so the
  crashing process has time to finish writing.
- Include full log content in the test_assert error message, so it
  appears in CI output regardless of stdout handling.
- Warn when the log appears truncated (no SUMMARY line found).

comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -240,106 +152,3 @@ jobs:
       - if: '!cancelled()'
         name: Show logs
         run: cat $(find "$LOG_DIR" -type f)
-
-  # TODO: matrixify
-  zig-build-linux:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
-    timeout-minutes: 45
-    name: build using zig build (linux)
-    env:
-      OPTS: -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe

@@ -240,106 +152,3 @@ jobs:
       - if: '!cancelled()'
         name: Show logs
         run: cat $(find "$LOG_DIR" -type f)
-
-  # TODO: matrixify
-  zig-build-linux:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
-    timeout-minutes: 45
-    name: build using zig build (linux)
-    env:
-      OPTS: -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe

comment_data.body: This makes it impossible to tell if the close callback has already arrived during the first `LOOP_PROCESS_EVENT_UNTIL()`.

comment_regular_data.body:

with that patch could this leak?: https://github.com/neovim/neovim/blob/f83d0b9653a8a548093645a9397f9f293b91c127/src/nvim/event/stream.c#L95-100

Hmm right. I forgot that `uv_stream` and `stream->uv.idle` share the same address, and also forgot about my own comment in `close_cb()` to reference <https://github.com/neovim/neovim/pull/34586#issuecomment-3471112970>...

labels.description: automation for build, test, and release
labels.name: ci

labels.description: May contain trace amounts of GMO
labels.name: AI assisted 🤖

title: ci: ensure full sanitizer logs are shown in CI
